name: Barbecued Lamb on Skewers
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Stewing lamb, cut into 1 1/4-inch cubes
1 tbsp Hot chili oil (or 1/2 tsp Cayenne and 1 tbsp Salad oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate the lamb cubes for 2 hours.
2. Drain the lamb, reserving the marinade for basting during barbecuing.
3. Skewer the lamb; you should have enough for two skewers per serving.
4. Barbecue until browned, but still juicy. Avoid overcooking to prevent dulling flavors.
5. Serve with nang (Moslem bread) or shao bing (baked sesame rolls).
